query: SELECT id, title, startTime, endTime, status, FROM_UNIXTIME(startTime/1000) as startLocal FROM appointments ORDER BY startTime DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2hQLtGFTQQF4sFv.root --database gixQA33Udhd38D2dSPdEnX --execute SELECT id, title, startTime, endTime, status, FROM_UNIXTIME(startTime/1000) as startLocal FROM appointments ORDER BY startTime DESC LIMIT 10;
